title: Front Office Manager - Kesari Tours - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Kesari Tours - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Kesari Tours in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kesari Tours:
Kesari Tours is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kesari Tours!
